resources.string: Active while inside a no-location zone, watching for new photos to scrub.
Inside %1$s — GPS will be removed from new photos.

plurals.name: photo_monitor_notification_text_multi
plurals.item: Inside %1$d zone — GPS will be removed from new photos.
Inside %1$d zones — GPS will be removed from new photos.

resources.string: One-shot notifications when a photo has been scrubbed (or failed).
